subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who, with the arm of power, hath shattered the idols of vain imaginings of the wicked ones who cast behind them the Book of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی کسر بعضد الاقتدار اصنام ظنون الاشرار الذین نبذوا کتاب الله عن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @Islamic rituals; holy days; practices; etc., @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @humility; meekness; lowliness
